features: Luxury gift set containing 250ml crème bath bubbles, 250ml bath & shower crème and 2 x 100g soaps
The perfect gift set for someone who deserves a self-care moment
Baylis & Harding's Tropical Paradise floral fragrance which is delicate yet indulgent
Floral keepsake box with recyclable cardboard wrap band
description: Product Description Elevate your bathing experience into a relaxing, spa like ritual with this gift set containing 250ml crème bath bubbles, 250ml bath & shower crème and 2 x 100g soaps, perfect to help balance mind, body and soul. Influenced by catwalk, interior and lifestyle trends, this year’s design partners a beautifully executed tropical floral print with luxe foils for femininity with a modern twist. A seductive colour palette of fuscia pink and teal green are elevated against a rich velvety grey back drop to give this collection the luxury edge perfect for any floral loving fashionista. The Boudoire Collection is our most feminine and indulgent collection. This Tropical Paradise with top notes of banana, peach and orange blossom is delicate yet indulgent, modern, and sumptuous. Ingredients BATH BUBBLES: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4.BATH & SHOWER CREME: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4.SOAP: Sodium Palmate, Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Palm Kernelate, Glycerin, Sodium Chloride, Parfum (Fragrance), Tetrasodium Edta, Tetrasodium Etidronate, Titanium Dioxide (Ci 77891). Directions Bath Bubbles - Pour Into Bath Under Warm Running Water. Bath & Shower Crème/Soap - Lather And Rinse. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
